summary: The capsule faithfully reconstructs the full ISR-shrink cascade (broker-3 lost → ISR 3→2→1 → NotEnoughReplicasException → produce failures) and is missing only minor role-accuracy issues, but assigns root_cause to the NotLeaderOrFollowerException on the replica fetcher rather than the originating cause (broker-3 connectivity loss from SocketServer errors) and does not include the ISR recovery line.
improvements: Reassign root_cause to the SocketServer 'Unexpected error from /10.0.6.9' lines (4/7) or the first ISR shrink (line 6) — NotLeaderOrFollowerException is a downstream symptom of the connectivity failure, not its origin

Include the ISR recovery line (line 14, 'Expanding ISR from 1 to 1,2') as a context or recovery entry so engineers can see the full incident arc and confirm the partition recovered without manual intervention
